title: Flag ON + External Site + New Student -ö Application created
description: AC-03 / AC-10 / AC-11 -ö Decision Table Row 1: Flag=ON, Channel=External Site, Student does not exist. System creates new Contact, Event Participant, and Application.
preconditions:
Activity Event "Trial Lesson A" exists with:
- Create Application flag = ON
- Location = Tokyo Branch
No existing Contact for the booker email: new-student@example.com
steps_actions:
1. "External student books Trial Lesson A via External Booking Site with email new-student@example.com"
2. "Verify a new Student (Contact) is created in Salesforce"
3. "Verify an Event Participant record links the new Contact to Trial Lesson A"
4. "Verify Application Creation API is triggered"
5. "Verify an Enrollment Application is created at Location = Tokyo Branch"
6. "Verify Application ID is stored on the Event Participant record"
steps_result:
1. "Booking is received and processed"
2. "New Contact created with email = new-student@example.com"
3. "Event Participant record exists linking the Contact to Trial Lesson A"
4. "API called with Student ID, Activity Event ID, Location = Tokyo Branch"
5. "Enrollment Application created at Tokyo Branch"
6. "Event Participant record contains the Application ID"
steps_data:
1. "Channel: External Booking Site\nBooker: new-student@example.com"
2. "Expected: new Contact record"
3. "Expected: Event Participant record"
4. "Payload: Student ID, Event ID, Location = Tokyo Branch"
5. "Expected: Application at Tokyo Branch"
6. "Expected: Application ID = non-null"
